page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Anthology - Summer Children
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Rapport Comics on 20 August 1996. The cover is illustrated by Shinji Ikariya. https://www.amazon.co.jp/SUMMER-CHILDREN-%E3%83%A9%E3%83%9D%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%B3%E3%83%9F%E3%83%83%E3%82%AF%E3%82%B9-%E5%86%AC%E5%87%AA%E3%82%8C%E3%81%8F/dp/4897992206
